name: Wound Clerid
descs: When hitting an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed', inflict 4 [Laceration] Potency.

When <style="upgradeHighlight">hitting an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed', or with a Wrath Affinity Skill</style>, <style="upgradeHighlight">inflict 5 [Laceration] Potency</style>.

When hitting an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed', or with a Wrath Affinity Skill, <style="upgradeHighlight">inflict 5 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count</style>.
